site.name: The Civil
site.tagline: Modern cocktails. Adventurous pies. Rotating flights.
site.description: From-scratch pizza and craft cocktails in Downtown Kitchener's Tannery building. Open Mon–Sat. Reservations and pickup via Toast.

home.title: The Civil — Pizza, cocktails, and rotating flights in Kitchener
home.description: From-scratch pies and theatrical cocktails. The Tannery, Downtown Kitchener. Open Mon–Sat.

menu.title: The Menu — The Civil
menu.description: Every pie, cocktail, and flight on offer at The Civil. Updated nightly.

cocktails.title: Cocktails & Flights — The Civil
cocktails.description: From-scratch cocktails and three-pour flights. Featuring the rotating bubble infusion.

the-cause.title: The Cause — A rotating charity pie
the-cause.description: Each month, $3 from every Cause pie funds a local Kitchener-Waterloo charity. Dine-in only.

visit.title: Visit — The Civil, 12-151 Charles St W, Kitchener
visit.description: Hours, address, parking, transit. We are in the Tannery, two blocks from Victoria Park.

private-events.title: Private Events — The Civil
private-events.description: Daytime takeovers, evening buyouts, bar-only nights. Up to 30 guests.

manifesto.title: Manifesto — Why we do this
manifesto.description: From-scratch dough. No TVs. Real fire. A short essay on what we believe and why.

press.title: Press — What people say
press.description: Pull quotes from real diners across Restaurant Guru, OpenTable, Tripadvisor, and Yelp.
